title: Vežba 20

questions.text: Koja od sledećih rečenica pravilno koristi glagol u past continuous vremenu?

answers.answer: She was cook dinner when her friend called.
answers.feedback: Zapamtite, glagol treba da bude u svom -ing obliku. Pravilan oblik je was cooking.

answers.answer: They were watching a movie last night.
He were studying for the exam when it started to rain.
answers.feedback: Važeći status je was studying za predstavnika jedne osobe he.

answers.answer: I was play the piano when the lights went out.
answers.feedback: Glagol treba da bude u svom -ing obliku. Pravilna rečenica je I was playing the piano when the lights went out.

description:
Prošlo trajno dejstvo (past continuous) koristi se za govor o radnjama koje su se dešavale u prošlosti.

Formira se korišćenjem was za zamenice I, he, she, it, ili were za zamenice you, we, they, nakon čega sledi glagol sa nastavkom -ing. Na primer:

I was reading znači da se radnja odvijala u određenom trenutku u prošlosti.

Past continuous se često koristi kada jednu radnju prekida druga radnja, kao u primeru I was reading when the phone rang. Čitanje je bilo prekinuto zvonjenjem telefona.
